items.headline: Los Gatos to hold municipal election November 3, 2026
items.summary: City Council adopted a resolution calling a general municipal election for November 3, 2026, to fill three seats on the council.

items.headline: Final map approved for Tract 10675 Boulevard development
items.summary: City Council approved the final map for Tract 10675 Boulevard, clearing the way for the subdivision project to move forward.

items.headline: Industrial gas system permitted at North 1st Street site
items.summary: A $600,000 building permit was issued for a CLF3 gas cabinet installation at Intermolecular's R&D facility at 3011 N 1st St, per San José permit records.

items.headline: Commercial/industrial project permitted on South 10th Street
items.summary: A $1.3 million commercial or industrial project received a permit at 1935 S 10th St. No tenant details are listed in the permit record.

items.headline: Parks and Recreation Strategic Plan Adopted
items.summary: Mountain View adopted a new strategic plan for parks and recreation. The plan sets direction for how the city will manage and develop its parks and recreation services over the coming years.

items.headline: City Council to Study Decarbonization Goals and Five-Year Plan
items.summary: Council will hold a study session on May 26 to examine Mountain View's decarbonization goal and review a five-year plan of specific actions to reduce emissions.

items.headline: City approves $1.6M traffic management agreement for FIFA World Cup
items.summary: Santa Clara City Council and Stadium Authority approved a Standard Agreement with the California Highway Patrol for traffic management services during the FIFA World Cup, with a projected cost of $1.6 million and a related budget amendment.

items.headline: City approves Seeds of Peace Monument artwork at Guadalupe River Park
items.summary: San José City Council approved an agreement with The Diane Brandenburg Survivor's Trust for a public artwork titled Seeds of Peace by artist Mario Chiodo, to be installed at Guadalupe River Park Arena Green West.
